\documentclass{article}
\usepackage{amsmath}
\title{Nested Lists}
\begin{document}

\section{Nested}

Outer paragraph.

\begin{itemize}
\item First level item 1
  \begin{itemize}
  \item Second level item A
  \item Second level item B
  \end{itemize}
\item First level item 2
  \begin{enumerate}
  \item Numbered A
  \item Numbered B
  \end{enumerate}
\end{itemize}

Cross-reference: see Section~\ref{sec:intro}.

\begin{equation}
A = \begin{pmatrix} 1 & 2 \\ 3 & 4 \end{pmatrix}
\end{equation}

\end{document}
